siteSlogan: Bringing Light to Families in Need

hero.title: Keren HaOhr
hero.subtitle: Bringing Light to Families in Need
hero.description: We are an Israeli non-profit dedicated to helping families struggling with food insecurity and lack of essential supplies. Every family deserves dignity, warmth, and hope.

infoCards.heading: How We Help
infoCards.card1Desc: Monthly shipments of nutritious food staples delivered directly to families in need.
infoCards.card2Desc: New and gently used clothing, shoes, and hygiene products for all ages.
infoCards.card3Desc: Immediate assistance for families facing crises, accidents, or unexpected hardship.
infoCards.card4Desc: Food baskets, gifts, and supplies so every family can celebrate with dignity.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.description: At Keren HaOhr, we believe no family should go hungry or lack basic necessities. We provide food packages, clothing, school supplies, and holiday support to thousands of families across Israel. With your help, we bring light into their lives.

programs.heading: What We Provide
programs.description: From nourishing meals to warm clothing — we support families with their most urgent needs.
programs.program1Desc: Monthly food baskets packed with fresh produce, grains, proteins, and dairy to sustain families through the month.
programs.program2Desc: Winter coats, shoes, and warm clothing distributed before the cold season to keep children warm.
programs.program3Desc: Backpacks filled with notebooks, pens, and supplies so every child can start the school year prepared.
programs.program4Desc: Special holiday food packages and gifts for Rosh Hashanah, Passover, and other Jewish holidays.

schedule.heading: Monthly Distribution Schedule
schedule.description: Here's how we serve our community throughout the month.

testimonials.heading: Hear From Our Community
testimonials.testimonial1Quote: Keren HaOhr helped us when my husband lost his job. The food packages meant we didn't have to choose between meals and rent. We'll never forget their kindness.
testimonials.testimonial2Quote: I volunteer every month because I've seen firsthand how these packages transform lives. This organization runs on love and dedication.
testimonials.testimonial3Quote: They showed up at our door with warm coats for my children right before winter. We had nothing, and they gave us warmth and dignity.

newsletter.heading: Stay Connected
newsletter.description: Sign up for our newsletter to receive updates on our work, volunteer opportunities, and ways to help.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Any family in Israel facing financial hardship — whether due to job loss, illness, disability, or other circumstances — can apply. We assess each case confidentially and with dignity.
faq.q2: How do I apply for help?
faq.a2: Contact us through our website form, call us at 03-796-1984, or visit our office in Petah Tikva. We'll guide you through the simple application process.
faq.q3: What do the food packages contain?
faq.a3: Our monthly packages include fresh produce, rice, pasta, canned goods, oil, dairy, eggs, chicken, and other nutritional staples tailored to family size.
faq.a4: We welcome volunteers! We need help with packing and distribution, sorting clothing donations, administrative support, and fundraising events. Sign up on our contact page.
faq.a5: 90% of every donation goes directly to programs and services. We maintain minimal administrative costs and publish annual impact reports for full transparency.

footer.tagline: Keren HaOhr ("The Light Fund") is an Israeli non-profit dedicated to helping families in need with food, clothing, and essential supplies. Together, we bring light to those who need it most.

teamPage.title: Our Team — Keren HaOhr
teamPage.heading: Meet Our Team
teamPage.description: Our dedicated team works tirelessly to bring light and support to families across Israel.

contactPage.title: Contact Us — Keren HaOhr
contactPage.heading: Contact Us
contactPage.description: Have questions, need help, or want to get involved? We'd love to hear from you!
contactPage.helpInfo2: Food packages distributed monthly to qualifying families
contactPage.helpInfo3: Volunteer orientations held every first Sunday of the month

formContact.messagePlaceholder: How can we help you? Are you seeking assistance, interested in volunteering, or something else?

formVolunteer.helpLabel: How would you like to help?
formVolunteer.notesPlaceholder: Tell us about your availability, skills, or any questions...

team.member1Bio: Rachel founded Keren HaOhr in 2018 with a vision to ensure no family in Israel goes hungry.
team.member2Bio: Avraham oversees food package assembly, volunteer coordination, and daily logistics across all distribution centers.
team.member3Bio: Maya connects with families in need, assesses their situations, and ensures they receive compassionate support.
team.member4Bio: Yossi leads our fundraising efforts, building relationships with donors who share our mission of kindness.
team.member5Bio: Tamar recruits, trains, and supports our network of 300+ volunteers who make our work possible.
team.member6Bio: Eli manages our warehouse, delivery routes, and ensures packages reach families across the country on time.
